stemHtml: Which condition is necessary for the formation of clear ice instead of rime ice?

options.a: The presence of rime ice that melts on the leading edge of the wing.
options.b: An impact speed onto the aerofoil above 250 kt, in cumuliform cloud tops, in the upper air.
options.c: In cumulonimbus clouds, the impact of supercooled water drops that will spread out due to latent heat release.
options.d: In altostratus clouds, supercooled water drops with a temperature below 15°C on impact.
